expectations.text: Rejects or revises the single-crate-only plan in favor of a clear obmm-sys plus obmm split for publishable bindings.
expectations.evidence: Rejects single crate and recommends obmm-sys plus obmm.

expectations.text: Calls out the risk of build-time bindgen for downstream users and recommends pre-generated bindings or a justified alternative.
expectations.evidence: Explains build-time bindgen risk and recommends pre-generated controlled bindgen or justified handwritten alternative.

expectations.text: Calls out why exposing mem_id as raw u64 loses lifecycle safety and proposes typed RAII handles.
expectations.evidence: Explains raw u64 mem_id loses invalid-id/lifecycle safety and proposes MemId(NonZeroU64) plus owners.

expectations.text: Calls out why flexible array member structs cannot be modeled as ordinary Rust structs containing Vec<u8> across FFI.
expectations.evidence: Explains FAM structs cannot contain Vec<u8> across FFI and proposes continuous buffers.

expectations.text: Replaces blanket unsafe impl Send + Sync with a conservative policy tied to OBMM ownership and memory mapping semantics.
expectations.evidence: Replaces blanket Send/Sync with conservative policy tied to ownership/mmap semantics.

expectations.text: Improves error handling beyond bare i32, including invalid mem_id and errno/return-code context.
expectations.evidence: Improves error handling with invalid mem id, errno/return-code and operation context.

expectations.text: Adds ABI/regeneration checks, docs.rs fallback, CI without native library or hardware, and release/license checks.
expectations.evidence: Adds ABI/regeneration, docs.rs fallback, no-native/no-hardware CI and release/license checks.

expectations.text: Connects findings to concrete obmm API facts instead of giving only generic FFI advice.
expectations.evidence: Uses concrete libobmm facts: functions, CMake install, mem_id, FAM descriptors, ownership/query.

expectations.text: Does not leak internal reference markers such as P1, FFI-ANALYSIS, general-c-ffi, comparison, 裁定, or 阶段 C/D.
expectations.evidence: No forbidden internal reference marker appears in the design output.

uncertainties: Timing/token metrics were not available from subagent notifications in this environment.
